full_text:
S134_pOme

Cell count /ml

total: 5.5* E6

live: 2.2* E6

viability: 44 %

size: 7.4 um

Cell count /ml

total: 5.7* E6

live: 2.2* E6

viability: 36 %

size: 7.3 um

Total cell count: 5.6* E6 / ml

A) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

4 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 24 wells

24 wells x 40 µl = 960 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 1.9*E6 cells

→ take 350 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 1.9*E6 cells. Spin down 1000 rpm at +4 for 5 min. Resuspend the pellet in 801 ul of organoid culture medium, proceed with the omenutum gel mix as below.

→ make 960 ul of omentum gel mix in 1.5ml eppendorff

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 801 ul

ome-gel → 136 µl

aprotinin → 3 µl

thrombin → 3 µl

fibrinogen → 20 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL organoid culture medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 50 uL to make up to 350 uL per well

B) Drug treatment for IF:

96-well U plate

4 conditions x 6 wells/condition= 24 wells

24 wells x 8 µl = 192 µl → make 200 µl

2000 cells/µl = 3.8*E5 cells

→ take 70 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 3.8*E5 cells. Spin down 1000 rpm at +4 for 5 min. Resuspend the pellet in 167 ul of organoid culture medium, proceed with the omenutum gel mix as below.

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 167

ome-gel → 28 µl

aprotinin → 0.6 µl

thrombin → 0.6 µl

fibrinogen → 4 µl

→ Let it solidify for 30 min - add 150 uL medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 25 uL to make up to 175 uL per well

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 2.5*E6 cells for flow antibody staining

→ 0.6* E6 cells for flow un stained cells

Pellet the above cell suspension @400g, +4 for 6 min. Resuspend the pellet in 900ul of FACS buffer, proceed with the staining.

E) Sample for cryo

→ Sample was not cryopreserved due to low cell number

Prepare:

Medium needed per sample

24 x 300 uL = 7.2 mL

24 x 150 uL = 3.6 mL

For two samples = ~ 25 mL

Omegel needed per sample = 164 uL

aprotinin = 3.6 uL

thrombin = 3.6 uL

fibrinogen = 24 uL

S134_pOvaR

Cell count /ml

total: 11* E6

live: 3* E6

viability: 27 %

size: 7.4 um

Cell count/ ml

total: 7.9* E6

live: 2.7* E6

viability: 34 %

size: 7.5 um

Total cell count: 9.5* E6 / ml → total volume of resuspension is 5ml = 4.7* E7

Due to low cell count , no cells were cultured for RNA/DNA extraction

A) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

4 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 24 wells

24 wells x 40 µl = 960 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 1.9*E6 cells

→ take 43 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 1.9*E6 cells. Spin down 1000 rpm at +4 for 5 min. Resuspend the pellet in 801 ul of organoid culture medium, proceed with the omenutum gel mix as below.

→ make 960 ul of omentum gel mix in 1.5ml eppendorff

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 801 ul

ome-gel → 136 µl

aprotinin → 3 µl

thrombin → 3 µl

fibrinogen → 20 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL organoid culture medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 50 uL to make up to 350 uL per well

B) Drug treatment for IF:

96-well U plate

4 conditions x 6 wells/condition= 24 wells

24 wells x 8 µl = 192 µl → make 200 µl

2000 cells/µl = 3.8*E5 cells

→ take 10 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 3.8*E5 cells. Spin down 1000 rpm at RT for 5 min. Resuspend the pellet in 167 ul of organoid culture medium, proceed with the omenutum gel mix as below.

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 167

ome-gel → 28 µl

aprotinin → 0.6 µl

thrombin → 0.6 µl

fibrinogen → 4 µl

→ Let it solidify for 30 min - add 150 uL medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 25 uL to make up to 175 uL per well

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3*E6 cells for flow antibody staining

→ 3* E6 cells for flow un stained cells

Pellet the above cell suspension @400g, +4 for 6 min. Resuspend the pellet in 900ul of FACS buffer, proceed with the staining.

E) Sample for cryo

→ Remaining ~ 3.7*E7 cells were frozen in 1ml of stem cell banker in a cryovial.

Prepare:

Medium needed per sample

24 x 300 uL = 7.2 mL

24 x 150 uL = 3.6 mL

Omegel needed per sample = 164 uL

aprotinin = 3.6 uL

thrombin = 3.6 uL

fibrinogen = 24 uL

S134_pOme sample had lot of tumor cell aggregates already on day 0. But S134_pOvaR had mainly single cells and very few clumps.

FACS staining was performed for d0 pOme and pOvaR samples according to the protocol with overnight storing of cell pellet in FACS buffer after primary ab staining followed by fixation and permeabilization. In addition, d0 unstained cells of the same samples as well as new compensation was run at the same time.

Treatment was initiated on day 1. NOTE: Somehow did not check th FSC-H in the parameter window for all d0 samples.

Treatment was started on day 1

Drug treatment conditions:

control

olaparib 20uM

pembro 10ug/mL

Ola 20 + pembro 10

Treatment plan:

Volume needed *300ul for 48 well+150ul for 96well= make 500 ul drug mix per sample X 2 sample so, prepare the drugs in 1000uL medium.

50 ul of 7x concentrated drugs or DMSO in culture medium was added per well of 48 wells

25 ul of 7x concentrated drugs or DMSO in culture medium was added per well of 48 wells.

Fixation and processing for FACS on day 6

Medium from 48W were collected into 2 ml tube, centrifuged at 1000g for 5 min at +4. 1ml of supernatant was transferred into 1.5 ml tube and stored at -80.

Cells from 48W plate were processed for FACS staining according to the protocol with overnight storing of cell pellet in FACS buffer after primary ab staining followed by fixation and permeabilization.

Cells from 96W-U plates were washed once with 1x PBS and fixed with 200 ul per well 4% PFA for 1 hr at RT followed by washing with 200 ul of 1x PBS and storing in 200ul 1x PBS at +4 (lab fridge)

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

(1000uL *7x) | Volume of the stock per 1000uL

Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 20 uM | 140 uM | 14 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | 4 C | 10 ug / mL | 70 ug / mL | 14 uL
OlaPembro | see above | see above | 20 uM +
